ValidationRule.description: Offering, role, pool, effective start, and hourly rate are required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Offering__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Job_Role__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Labor_Pool__c)), ISBLANK(Effective_Start__c), ISBLANK(Hourly_Rate__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Offering, job role, labor pool, effective start, and hourly rate are required.
